title: Chat Tweaks - Secure
description: A lightweight client-side mod that filters chat messages by removing unwanted special characters and blocking custom words to help streamers and players keep their chat clean and readable.
body:
🔒 ChatTweaks - Secure – Ultimate Privacy and Filter Control for Minecraft Chat

ChatTweaks - Secure is a lightweight Minecraft client mod designed to give players full control over their chat experience. With a clean, user-friendly GUI, customize privacy and message filtering options to keep your chat clean, safe, and distraction-free.

🚀 Key Features

  • 🛡️ Secure Mode
    Enable a special mode that enhances chat privacy and safety, perfect for streamers or players wanting peace of mind.
  • ⚠️ Filter Words
    Block messages containing custom, configurable keywords to avoid unwanted content in your chat.
  • 🙈 Hide All Messages
    Temporarily hide all incoming chat messages with a single toggle for maximum focus.
  • 🔤 Disable Special Characters
    Automatically block messages containing special or potentially disruptive characters.
  • 🎨 Easy Configuration GUI
    Intuitive in-game screen to toggle features and manage filter words effortlessly.
  • 🎮 Keybinding Support
    Quickly open the Secure Config menu using a configurable hotkey (default: “O”).

🧭 Usage

  • Activate Secure Mode to access all privacy and filter features.
  • Toggle filtering options on/off as needed.
  • Add or remove comma-separated filter words in the settings menu.
  • Use the hotkey to open or close the configuration screen anytime.

⚙️ Configuration

No manual config file edits needed! The mod auto-loads and saves your settings in a JSON file inside the Minecraft config folder. All settings are manageable via the GUI.

⚠️ Requirements

  • Minecraft Version: 1.21.4 (Fabric Client mod)
  • Fabric Loader: Compatible with Fabric API and Fabric Loader

💡 Use Cases

  • Streamers who want to keep their chat safe and distraction-free during live broadcasts.
  • Players who prefer clean and readable chat without spam, offensive words, or confusing special characters.
  • Anyone seeking simple but effective chat customization without heavy performance impact.

📚 Developer Notes

  • Created by Jakomi1 with a focus on lightweight design and ease of use.
  • Built with Fabric API for reliable integration into the Minecraft client.
  • Features a modular design, making it easy to extend and maintain.
